content: Instagram ToS prohibits automated data collection without permission; scraping public data is arguably legal post hiQ v LinkedIn but ToS-violating and platforms enforce via IP blocks, account bans, CAPTCHAs. Strict rate limits (~200 req/hr/IP), datacenter IPs (AWS/GCP/DO) blocked instantly, fingerprint-based anti-bot. Scrapers break frequently as Instagram changes markup. Reliability is fragile; treat as best-effort/manual-assisted, never a hard dependency.
